# Customer Authorization Letter Template

> This is a template. Legal counsel should review before use.

## Authorization for DDoS Readiness Validation

Customer: `<Customer legal name>`

AstraNull tenant/org ID: `<Tenant ID>`

Authorized target group(s):

| Target group | Targets | Environment | Approved window |
|---|---|---|---|
| `<name>` | `<FQDN/IP/URL list>` | `<prod/staging/lab>` | `<date/time/timezone>` |

The customer authorizes AstraNull SOC to coordinate and/or execute the approved DDoS readiness validation within the scope and time window listed above.

## Constraints

- Tests must remain within the approved target scope.
- AstraNull SOC may stop the test at any time.
- Customer may request immediate stop through the emergency contact path.
- Provider approvals must be obtained where required.

| Name | Role | Phone | Email |
|---|---|---|---|
| `<name>` | `<role>` | `<phone>` | `<email>` |

Authorized approver:

Name: `<name>`

Title: `<title>`

Signature/date: `<signature/date>`
